zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I於1115年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蓋爾時，他的父親Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael43歲，母親Havoise de Hédé et Montauban30歲。他於大約1145年與Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët在法國布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1157年5月11日在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蒙特福吉素-享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I于1115年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蓋爾时，他的父亲Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael43岁，母亲Havoise de Hédé et Montauban30岁。他于大约1145年与Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët在法国布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1157年5月11日在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蒙特福吉素-享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I was born in 1115, in Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael, was 43 and his mother, Havoise de Hédé et Montauban, was 30. He married Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët about 1145, in Josselin, Morbihan, Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 11 May 1157, in Montfort-sur-Meu, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I est né en 1115, à Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Havoise de Hédé et Montauban, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët environ 1145, à Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 11 mai 1157, à Montfort-sur-Meu, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I 1115 in Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael 43 und seine Mutter Havoise de Hédé et Montauban 30. Er hat um 1145 in Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 11. Mai 1157 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Montfort-sur-Meu, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I è nato il nel 1115 nel Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Havoise de Hédé et Montauban, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët circa 1145, nel Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 11 maggio 1157, nel Montfort-sur-Meu, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé Iが1115年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインガeルで生まれた時，父Sir Raoul de Montfort Gaelは43歳，母Havoise de Hédé et Montaubanは30歳であった。約1145年にフランスブレタグンモービハンジョセリンでAmicie de Rohun de Porhoëtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1157年5月11日にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインモントフォート-スル-メウで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I(이)가 1115년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 가e에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Havoise de Hédé et Montauban(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1145년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 조셀인에서 Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1157년 5월 11일 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 몽포트-수-우에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I nasceu em 1115, em Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Havoise de Hédé et Montauban, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët aproximadamente 1145, em Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 11 de maio de 1157, em Montfort-sur-Meu, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I родился в 1115 г. в местности гаeл, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Havoise de Hédé et Montauban, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët около 1145 г. в местности джосселинь, морбихань, бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 11 мая 1157 г. в местности монтфорт-сур-меу, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I nació en 1115, en Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Havoise de Hédé et Montauban, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët aproximadamente 1145, en Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 11 de mayo de 1157, en Montfort-sur-Meu, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 42 años.
